flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 32% at Pennsylvania Highlands Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (719 vs 1.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pennsylvania Highlands Community College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($7.4k → $8.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pennsylvania Highlands Community College rose 15% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.6k → $11.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pennsylvania Highlands Community College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (23.5% → 20.6%).
